results.feature_description: Members must contact the Exchange when an order or trade fails price validation.

scenarios.title: Member contacts Exchange after price validation failure

given_steps.step_text: an order or trade fails the price validation check
given_steps.step_pattern: an order or trade fails the price validation check

when_steps.step_text: the Member contacts the Exchange to explain the rationale as to the price
when_steps.step_pattern: the Member contacts the Exchange to explain the rationale as to the price

then_steps.step_text: the contact action is recorded as compliant
then_steps.step_pattern: the contact action is recorded as compliant

results.feature_description: Requests must be made no later than 15 minutes before the relevant deadline.

scenarios.title: Extension request is made at least 15 minutes before deadline

given_steps.step_text: a post-trade request has a relevant deadline
given_steps.step_pattern: a post-trade request has a relevant deadline

when_steps.step_text: the request is submitted 16 minutes before the relevant deadline
when_steps.step_pattern: the request is submitted (\d+) minutes before the relevant deadline

then_steps.step_text: the request is accepted as timely
then_steps.step_pattern: the request is accepted as timely
